name_en: 🎉New Arrival Mail Bag🎉1BD394 Lambskin Black 🎉🎉This handbag perfectly blends sophistication and functionality, featuring imported lambskin. Soft silhouette with multiple pockets. Lightweight practical design combining sporty and versatile elements, adorned with enamel triangle metal logo and leather details. Comes with 2 detachable shoulder straps, large capacity, just perfect, another timeless classic, unisex large size, grab yours now🎉🎉Dimensions: L30xH14xW10cm🎉🎉
